title: penstemon glaber var. alpinus
intro: Penstemon glaber var. alpinus, also known as alpine beardtongue, is a perennial plant species in the plantain family that is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs, and its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe sore throats and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Penstemon glaber var. alpinus include its ability to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to act as an antioxidant, protecting against cell damage and promoting overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote health and wellness.
